summary: Tested three targeted fixes for MatchMe app: (1) Integer credits with counter-based earning, (2) Results page with reviewer usernames, (3) Auth page input padding. All fixes verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 - Stripe API key is invalid (sk_live_... key not valid). Known issue from iteration_4.
minor.priority: LOW - Stripe integration code is correct, just needs valid API key

passed_tests: FIX 1: New user registration returns integer credits (3) - PASSED
FIX 1: Dashboard API returns integer credits for free users - PASSED
FIX 1: Admin user has integer credits (999) - PASSED
FIX 1: Credit deduction stays integer (3 -> 2 after job creation) - PASSED
FIX 1: ratings_since_last_credit counter initialized to 0 - PASSED
FIX 1: Sidebar displays integer credits (3 credits, 999 credits) - PASSED via Playwright
FIX 1: Dashboard badge shows integer credits - PASSED via Playwright
FIX 2: Backend process_job includes ratings array with rater_username field - CODE VERIFIED
FIX 2: Results.jsx displays reviewer username above each rating card - CODE VERIFIED
FIX 2: Results.jsx shows individual confident/approachable/attractive scores - CODE VERIFIED
FIX 2: Results.jsx shows reviewer comment below scores - CODE VERIFIED
FIX 2: Anonymous fallback when username is missing - CODE VERIFIED
FIX 3: Auth page email input has pl-10 padding (40px) - PASSED via Playwright
FIX 3: Auth page password input has pl-10 padding (40px) - PASSED via Playwright
FIX 3: Auth page name input has pl-10 padding (40px) - PASSED via Playwright
FIX 3: CSS input-minimal uses padding-top/padding-bottom (12px each) - PASSED via Playwright
FIX 3: No icon/text overlap in auth form inputs - PASSED via visual inspection
critical_code_review_comments: FIX 1 VERIFIED: User model now includes ratings_since_last_credit (0) and job_bonus_count (0) fields
FIX 1 VERIFIED: submit_rating increments ratings_since_last_credit counter, resets to 0 and adds 1 credit when reaching 5
FIX 1 VERIFIED: Job completion bonus uses job_bonus_count counter (0-4), awards 1 credit when reaching 5
FIX 1 VERIFIED: Frontend uses Math.floor() on credits in Dashboard.jsx, Sidebar.jsx, BestShot.jsx, ProfileAnalysis.jsx
FIX 2 VERIFIED: process_job builds individual_ratings array with rater_username from users collection
FIX 2 VERIFIED: Results.jsx correctly maps allRatings to display reviewer cards with username, scores, and comment
FIX 3 VERIFIED: Auth.jsx inputs use pl-10 class (40px padding-left)
FIX 3 VERIFIED: index.css input-minimal uses padding-top: 12px and padding-bottom: 12px instead of shorthand

success_rate.backend: 97% (30/31 tests passed, 1 Stripe API key issue)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three fixes verified working. FIX 2 (Results page with reviewer usernames) was code-verified but not end-to-end tested because no completed jobs with ratings exist in the system. The backend process_job function correctly includes rater_username in each rating, and Results.jsx correctly displays the data. To fully test FIX 2, create a job, have another user rate the photos, then run the worker to complete the job.

backend_changes: User model: ratings_since_last_credit=0, job_bonus_count=0 on registration
submit_rating: Increments counter, awards 1 credit when counter reaches 5, resets to 0
process_job: Awards job bonus via counter (5 completions = 1 credit)
FIX_1_integer_credits.test_results: All backend tests passed, frontend displays integer credits

FIX_2_results_with_usernames.status: CODE VERIFIED (no completed jobs to test end-to-end)
backend_changes: process_job lines 963-975: Builds individual_ratings array with rater_username from users collection
Each rating includes: rater_username, confident, approachable, attractive, comment, tags
frontend_changes: Results.jsx lines 76-78: Collects allRatings from ranked photos
Results.jsx lines 184-217: Renders review cards with username, scores, comment
FIX_2_results_with_usernames.test_results: Code structure verified correct, awaiting completed job for e2e test

css_changes: index.css lines 136-137: padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px (instead of shorthand)
FIX_3_auth_input_padding.test_results: Playwright verified 40px padding-left on all inputs, no icon/text overlap
